title: Progressive Disclosure, References, Scripts, and Assets · MCP Build Room
summary: Refactor an oversized skill into a compact router and focused resources. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a progressively disclosed skill package while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep metadata discriminative within shared context budgets.
Keep SKILL.md complete but route variant details to named resources.
Organize authoritative references by decision point and expected use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-asset-reuse-1c8gej: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Asset Reuse into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-asset-reuse-1c8gej:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

steps.title: Defend the transferred model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Asset Reuse applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Provide templates and assets that prevent inconsistent recreation.
